title: Supplementaries + Create: Food Compat
description: Adds support to Supplementaries for Create: Food items, such as juice in jars, by implementing them as soft fluids.
body:
# Supplementaries + Create: Food Compat

Adds support to Supplementaries for Create: Food items, such as juice in jars, by implementing them as soft fluids. That means, yes, you can use both your bottles and your buckets to fill and empty jars.

The tables and desks seen in the Gallery are from the wonderful [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted) mod. Check it out!

## Requirements
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Create: Food](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-food)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

## Implemented
- Juices
- Jams
- Milkshakes
- Molasses
- Yogurt, Condensed Milk, Fruit Smoothie, Sour Cream, Vinegar
- Cream Frosting
- Chocolate, Hot Chocolate, Chocolate Milk
